name: RPlog_An_Encounter_on_Tatooine
title: An Encounter on Tatooine
summary: As Tatooine's suns set over an emptying Mos Eisley, the Corellian pilot Wes finds himself swarmed by pestering Jawas and a coin-hungry local child in a docking bay. Nearby stands the robed Elomin Flaron Korr, who watches with curiosity as Wes fends off the attention. Wes jokingly asks the stranger whether he has a sign on his back, and the two strike up a wary conversation; Flaron introduces himself as a finder of men, currently unemployed. Learning that Wes makes his living connecting people and recently flew a bounty hunter and his captives to Kappa, Flaron asks whether Wes knows a dealer in colorful equipment, admitting he has little money and needs only a basic weapon and perhaps a personal shield. Wes figures a weapon is easy enough but doubts anyone he knows can supply a personal shield, leaving the deal open as their chance meeting winds down.
